open_low_severity_findings: L1: If post-commit getGroup fetch fails in cancelInvitationImpl.ts:98, local UI does not refresh until next external trigger. MLS state remains authoritative; only a soft local inconsistency. Not blocking.
L2: Admin-pubkey filter in cancelInvitationImpl.ts:65-68 lowercase-compares; depends on Nostr-standard lowercase storage. Reasonable but undocumented assumption.

L3 (process): Codex adversarial review on the proposeRemoveUser bypass fix was substituted by team-lead manual review due to Codex usage cap (resets 1:45 PM). No critical or high findings; covered the same five focus areas (multi-device safety, wire format, signing, empty-leaves handling, AC-CPI-13 convergence).
